response.justification: The candidate has roughly 19 years of hands-on software development experience, satisfying the tenure minimum, and shows genuine breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators) and founder experience with GISCollective. However, this is a director-level AI strategy role requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, and executive-level influence with strategic customers — the resume reflects a strong senior/staff-level individual contributor and craftsman, not a principal-level AI strategist. AI/ML depth, cloud platform strategy experience, and evidence of inspiring organizations through disruptive initiatives are largely absent.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency backend systems
Founder experience (GISCollective) plus open-source contributions and community teaching/workshops
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML depth or recognized AI expertise with shipped AI products at scale
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC delivery work, not director-level strategy or engineering leadership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited cloud platform strategy experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Seniority gap versus director-level strategic scope
Long, broad engineering tenure with entrepreneurial experience
